heading: Establishment
label: 287 Establishment
text: There is hereby established in the House of Representatives an office to be known as the Office of the Parliamentarian, hereinafter in this chapter referred to as the “Office”.
notes: CodificationSection is based on section 1 of House Resolution No. 502, Ninety-fifth Congress, , which was enacted into permanent law by .Apr. 20, 1977Pub. L. 95–94

Effective DateSection 6 of House Resolution No. 502, , as enacted into permanent law by , provided that:Apr. 20, 1977section 115 of Pub. L. 95–94“This resolution [this chapter] shall take effect as of , and shall continue in effect until otherwise provided by law.”March 1, 1977
